name: Serverless Function Injection
description: Attack tree modelling exploitation of serverless/FaaS platforms (Lambda, Azure Functions) through dependency confusion, event injection, and runtime escape
root_objective: Achieve code execution and data exfiltration via serverless function compromise

nodes.title: Compromise Serverless Functions for Data Exfiltration
nodes.description: Inject malicious code into serverless functions to steal secrets, exfiltrate data, or pivot to other cloud services

nodes.title: Inject Malicious Dependency
nodes.description: Introduce a trojanised package into the function's dependency chain

nodes.title: Dependency Confusion Attack
nodes.description: Register a public package with the same name as a private internal package to hijack the install

nodes.title: Compromise Existing npm/PyPI Package
nodes.description: Take over a maintainer account of a popular dependency used by the function

nodes.title: Exploit Event Source Injection
nodes.description: Inject payloads through event sources that trigger the function

nodes.title: Inject via API Gateway Input
nodes.description: Send crafted HTTP request that is passed unsanitised to the function's runtime for OS command injection

nodes.title: Poison S3/Blob Trigger Object
nodes.description: Upload a malicious file to an S3 bucket that triggers a vulnerable function for processing

nodes.title: Abuse Function IAM Role
nodes.description: Leverage the function's overly permissive IAM execution role to access other cloud resources

nodes.title: Extract Temporary Credentials
nodes.description: Read the function's IAM temporary credentials from environment variables or metadata service

nodes.title: Pivot to RDS/DynamoDB via IAM Role
nodes.description: Use the function's IAM role to query databases it has access to and exfiltrate data

nodes.title: Establish Persistence in Serverless
nodes.description: Maintain access to the serverless environment beyond a single invocation

nodes.title: Modify Function Code via API
nodes.description: Use stolen credentials to update the function's code package with a persistent backdoor

nodes.title: Add Malicious Lambda Layer
nodes.description: Attach a Lambda Layer containing backdoor code that runs on every invocation
